Class Main

java.lang.Object
cz.cuni.mff.java.Main
public class Main extends Object
The Main class is the main point for training/evaluating/plotting results of a neural network model.

Command-line arguments:

  • --evaluate (default: true) - Whether to evaluate the model on test set after training.
  • --plot (default: true) - Whether to run the Python script to plot metrics and ROC curve.
  • --save (default: true) - Whether to save the trained model locally.
  • --modelPath (default: src/models/model.ser) - Path to load or save the model.
  • --dataPath (default: src/data/processed_training.csv) - Path to the dataset.
  • --splitRatio (default: 0.8) - Ratio of training data to use (remaining is for testing).

After training or loading the model, it optionally evaluates the model and generates visual metrics.

Example of usage: 


 java -cp target cz.cuni.mff.java.Main --evaluate=false --modelPath=out/model.ser

      public Main()

  • Method Details

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args) throws IOException
      Program entry point. Parses command-line arguments, loads or trains a model, optionally evaluates it, saves metrics, and visualizes results.
      Parameters:
      args - command-line arguments (e.g., --evaluate=false)
      Throws:
      IOException - if reading/writing model or dataset fails

    • loadOrTrainModel

      public static void loadOrTrainModel(SimpleNN model, DataHandler.SplitData data, String modelPath, boolean saveModel) throws IOException
      Loads a trained model if some exists, otherwise trains a new model and saves it (if flag is set).
      Parameters:
      model - the SimpleNN instance to load into or train
      data - the dataset split into train/test parts
      modelPath - the path to load or save the serialized model
      saveModel - if true, saves the trained model after training
      Throws:
      IOException - if deserialization or saving fails

    • runPlottingScript

      public static void runPlottingScript(String metricsFile, String rocFile)
      Runs a Python script to plot training metrics and ROC curves.
      Parameters:
      metricsFile - the path to the metrics CSV file
      rocFile - the path to the ROC curve CSV file
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if the Python script fails to run

    • parseArgs

      public static Map<String,String> parseArgs(String[] args)
